name: Is it stated?
input:
The first line contains an integer $t$ ($1 \leq t \leq 100$) — the number of testcases.
The following $t$ lines each contain a string of length at most $100$ consisting of lowercase English letters.
output: For each test case, output "YES" or "NO", denoting the answer.

samples.input:
10
is
it
stated
submit
ac
accepted
wa
wronganswer
tle
timelimitexceeded
samples.output:
NO
YES
NO
YES
NO
NO
NO
NO
NO
YES
